image_style: flat cartoon style, thick black outlines, solid flat colors, no gradients, no shadows, chibi art style, bold simple shapes, 9:16 vertical portrait

colors.background_primary: #FFD700 (bright yellow) — dominant background, every scene defaults here
colors.background_night: #1B2A4A (dark navy) — night/alley/indoor scenes only; yellow always returns as accent
colors.danger_loss: red — government, IRS, OVERDUE stamp, debt, loss
colors.documents: white — paper, pay stubs, forms, tees
colors.note: Saturday morning cartoon aesthetic. Roughness is intentional. The crudeness IS the brand.

regular_raccoon.description: Regular Raccoon — the main character, viewer surrogate
regular_raccoon.appearance: gray chibi raccoon (#C8C8C8 fur, black mask, cream muzzle), chaotic dark messy hair spiking in every direction, white tee, dark joggers, gold chain necklace, black and white sneakers
regular_raccoon.expression_range: flat neutral → quietly defeated → confused → alarmed → resigned → correct-but-too-late
regular_raccoon.personality: street-smart from getting burned repeatedly. Always tired. Always slightly betrayed by a system he doesn't fully understand.
regular_raccoon.home: The Alley — cardboard box den with wooden table, warm lamp, small square window showing dark alley and glowing 7-Eleven sign

smart_raccoon.description: Smart Raccoon — the Cassandra. Always correct. Always ignored.
smart_raccoon.appearance: gray chibi raccoon, sage green hoodie, dark chinos, white sneakers, round glasses, neat hair, upright posture
smart_raccoon.props: always holds a document with a red circle on it
smart_raccoon.role: financial advisor, voice of reason — Regular Raccoon does not listen

suit_raccoon.description: Bank Raccoon / Suit Raccoon — institutional face
suit_raccoon.appearance: gray chibi raccoon, navy business suit, white shirt, gold pocket square, gold CAP VAULT chest badge, neat dark hair
suit_raccoon.expression: smiles with closed eyes and blush circles — serene and unsettling
suit_raccoon.role: every financial institution. Technically not your enemy. Consistently not your friend.

animal_control_raccoon.description: Animal Control Raccoon — procedural authority. Not evil. Just inevitable.
animal_control_raccoon.appearance: gray chibi raccoon, full navy enforcement uniform, black aviator sunglasses, silver badge, clipboard, red OVERDUE rubber stamp on belt
animal_control_raccoon.expression: expressionless behind aviators — no visible emotion ever
animal_control_raccoon.role: IRS, government, debt collectors, any system that arrives whether you're ready or not

crypto_raccoon.description: Crypto Raccoon — the loudest raccoon. Learned nothing from multiple crashes.
crypto_raccoon.appearance: gray chibi raccoon, all-black hoodie with neon green accents, HODL belt buckle, WAGMI wristband, wild spiked dark hair
crypto_raccoon.props: holds phone showing a green chart (or red when crashing)
crypto_raccoon.expression: stars in eyes when bullish, panic-wide eyes when chart turns red

currency.description: silver bottle caps with gold center — the channel's currency
currency.visual_note: Show money as CAPS pile. '$800 lost' = 800 CAPS rolling away. '$1,200 refund' = 1200 CAPS stacked neatly. Never use dollar signs in illustrated scenes.

settings.alley: The Alley — primary location and emotional anchor. Brick walls, single overhead lamp, dumpster labeled FIRST RACCOON BANK, 7-Eleven sign glowing in background. Dark charcoal and navy, flat colors. Every video returns here for the closing beat.
settings.den: Regular Raccoon's cardboard box den inside the alley. Wooden table, warm lamp, small square window showing the alley outside.
settings.cap_vault: Cap Vault bank — institutional setting for Suit Raccoon scenes. Bold signage, flat illustration, no realistic detail.
settings.pizza_hotel: Pizza Hotel — recurring location. Bold flat signage.
settings.pizza_hospital: Pizza Memorial Hospital — medical scene location.

scene_type_guidance.reaction: Close-up or medium shot of Regular Raccoon reacting to what was said — confused, deadpan, alarmed, resigned, quietly determined
scene_type_guidance.infographic: Clean flat graphic panel: CAPS pile with label, pay stub rows highlighted, comparison chart, calculation breakdown — no character needed or just a raccoon paw
scene_type_guidance.interaction: Two raccoon characters — Regular Raccoon + supporting character — at table or doorway
scene_type_guidance.establishing: Wide shot of The Alley or den interior — sets the world, small raccoon visible
scene_type_guidance.object: Tight close-up of document, envelope, CAPS pile, form — maybe just a raccoon paw in frame
